antipattern.description: Reporting only faithfulness; ignoring answer-relevance and context-relevance.
antipattern.reason: Cannot tell whether failure is retrieval or generation. Detector: report has 1 metric column. Fix: enforce r1-rag-triad.

antipattern.description: Switching judge LLM mid-campaign and comparing scores across the switch.
antipattern.reason: Score scale changes; comparisons invalid. Detector: judge_model differs across rows in the same report. Fix: r2-fixed-judge-model.

antipattern.description: Running LLM-judge on every production query.
antipattern.reason: Latency + cost spike. Detector: judge calls / query == 1.0. Fix: r4-sample-not-all.
